creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196771
Crashdump summary from this panic.

FreeBSD service1.rbsd.freebsd.org 12.0-ALPHA3 FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA3 #0 r338350M: Tue Aug 28 17:14:21 UTC 2018     peter@build-12.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CLUSTER12  amd64


This machine panic'd overnight.  I've never seen this specific crash before.
